summary: Iteration 103 - Tested 4 features: Quick Access buttons, Deletion Audit Trail, Report Builder CRUD, and Comparative Period Analysis. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Quick Access buttons - VERIFIED: 6 buttons in sidebar (Cashier, Waiter, Kitchen, Orders, Tables, Customers) that open new tabs via window.open()

Audit Trail page - VERIFIED: Shows Total Attempts, Allowed, Denied stats with search/filter by module/status, table displays user_email, user_role, module, record_summary, record_date, allowed status, and reason
Deletion audit logging - VERIFIED: DELETE /api/sales creates entry in /api/access-policies/delete-audit-log with record_summary showing 'Sale #xxx - SAR amount'
Report Builder CRUD - VERIFIED: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/report-templates all working, Run report via POST /api/report-templates/{id}/run returns data, summary, total

Report Builder UI - VERIFIED: Create Template dialog shows name, data source (8 options: sales, expenses, supplier_payments, customers, employees, invoices, stock, activity_logs), columns selection, sort_by, sort_order, group_by, chart_type, date filters
Comparative Analysis API - VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/comparative?period=day|week|month|year returns current_label, previous_label, metrics array with label, current, previous, change_pct

Comparative Analysis UI - VERIFIED: Tab in Advanced Analytics shows Period Comparison card with Day/Week/Month/Year buttons, metric cards comparing this-period vs last-period, and bar chart visualization
Navigation links - VERIFIED: /report-builder appears under Reports section, /audit-trail appears under Admin section
seed_data_creation: Created test sales for audit trail verification (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 103 verified 4 new features: 1) Quick Access buttons in sidebar that open /cashier, /waiter, /kds, /order-status, /table-management, /customer-portal in new tabs, 2) Deletion Audit Trail at /audit-trail showing all delete attempts with user info, timestamps, module, record_summary, allowed status and reason - API is GET /api/access-policies/delete-audit-log, 3) Report Builder at /report-builder with full CRUD - POST /api/report-templates creates template, POST /api/report-templates/{id}/run executes and returns data, 4) Comparative Period Analysis via GET /api/reports/comparative?period=day|week|month|year showing this-period vs last-period metrics with percentage change - accessible via Comparison tab in Advanced Analytics page. All backend APIs return correct data structures and all frontend UI elements are properly wired.

quick_access_buttons.behavior: Opens in new tab via window.open()

run_response.summary: object with total_records, total_amount, avg_amount, min_amount, max_amount

ui_elements: Metric cards with this-period vs last-period
